title: Notification when an automation fails
excerpt: When an automations fails there isn’t a way to be notified. We’re currently relying on end users to report that the board is no longer working for them. Having the ability to be notified in instances where automations fa…

posts.author: CDaniels (Christie Daniels)
posts.cookedHtml: When an automations fails there isn’t a way to be notified. We’re currently relying on end users to report that the board is no longer working for them. Having the ability to be notified in instances where automations fail would ensure that business disruptions would be minimal.
